HardwareFilters.HardwareFilter: 0.1 to 200 Hz with 60 Hz notch filter

TaskDescription: longitudinal training study with intervention cue: 2.0s, imagery: 6.0s.
Instructions: Imagine your left (right) hand opening and closing to move the cursor left (right). Imagine both hands opening and closing to move the cursor up. Finally, to move the cursor down, voluntarily rest; in other words, clear your mind.
InstitutionName: Carnegie Mellon University, University of Minnesota
InstitutionAddress: Pittsburgh, PA, USA; Minneapolis, MN, USA
InstitutionalDepartmentName: Carnegie Mellon University, Pittsburgh, PA, USA; University of Minnesota, Minneapolis, MN, USA
Description: Continuous sensorimotor rhythm based brain computer interface learning in a large population
